steps.title: Identify the critical signal
steps.content: The passage shows that something caused ecologists to “express reservations” about the traditional descriptions' utility. Reservations—skepticism about a theory—arise when new findings contradict the old theory.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
”Discrepancies between” captures the contradictions between traditional descriptions and recent observations—exactly what would trigger doubts about the old theory's usefulness.

The other three suggest announcements, repetitions, or similarities rather than conflict.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
